formulasIntro: Saved prompts you can run over any recording from its Formulas tab.
formulasEmpty: No formulas yet. Create one to get started.
formulaContextHint: Choose which parts of the recording this formula can see.
nativeLanguageHint: Used as the default language when translating a transcript.
appLanguageHint: The language the interface is shown in (where a translation is available).
calendarSelectionHint: Choose which Google calendars to consider when matching recordings to meetings. Only the selected calendars appear elsewhere in the app.
googleNotConnected: Not connected. Sign in with Google to link your account.
googleDataHint: Tick what to allow, then Connect to grant access at Google. Used to match recordings to your calendar meetings.
googleConnectError: Could not start the Google connection.
calFeedsIntro: Subscribe to external .ics calendar feeds (public team or shared calendars). Their events show on the Calendar tab in the colour you choose. Works with or without Google connected.
calFeedSaveError: Could not save the calendar feed.
calFeedRemoveError: Could not remove the calendar feed.
mcpIntro: Generate a token to connect Claude to your transcripts. Add the URL and token to Claude's MCP config; the token is shown only once.
mcpTokenOnce: Copy this token now - you won't be able to see it again.
mcpDesktopNote: Claude Desktop runs this through mcp-remote (needs Node.js installed). Claude Code can instead add the URL and token directly.
mcpConnectionsIntro: Apps you signed in to connect - like the Claude website. Revoke one to disconnect it.
apiIntro: Generate a personal token to call the Diariz API as yourself. The token is shown once - store it securely.
apiTokenOnce: Copy this token now - it won't be shown again.
apiLoadError: The API reference couldn't be loaded. Please try again.
apiAccessEnabledHelp: Let users generate personal API tokens and call the Diariz API. Off by default.
platformAiIntro: Platform-wide AI generation settings applied to every user.
recordingsIntro: Choose where a new recording is filed in your personal space.
aiIntro: Your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint, used for both summaries and chat. Leave fields blank to use the server default.
keyWillClear: The stored key will be cleared on save.
chatToolsHint: Let the chat model call built-in tools that search your transcripts. Requires a model that supports tool calling.
reasoningHint: Ask reasoning-capable models to think before answering (sends reasoning_effort). Leave off for models that don't support it.
quotasIntro: New users start with the starter quota; administrators can raise a user up to the maximum.
autoDeleteAudioHint: A nightly job deletes the audio of recordings older than the retention window (transcripts are kept). Protected recordings are never touched.
retentionDaysInvalid: The retention window must be a whole number of days (at least 1).
runAudioRetentionConfirm: Delete the audio of all recordings older than {{days}} days now? Protected recordings are kept. This cannot be undone.
backupDescription: Download the entire platform - the database and all stored files - as a single archive you can keep or move to another machine.
backupSensitive: The backup contains all platform data (including password hashes and every recording). Store it securely.
tagBackfillDescription: Queue tag extraction for every recording that has never been tagged (for example, recordings made before the tag cloud existed, or whose owner had no AI model configured). Tags appear as the jobs complete.
runTagBackfillConfirm: Queue tag extraction for every recording without tags? Each recording is processed with its owner's AI model settings.
restoreDescription: Replace this platform's data with the contents of a backup archive. Only a backup from this app version can be restored.
restoreDanger: This permanently replaces ALL data - every user, recording and setting. The app is briefly unavailable and you will be signed out.
restoreConfirm: I understand this will permanently replace all current data.
restoreMigrated: Restored an older backup and upgraded its data to the current version ({{from}} to {{to}}).
restoreRestartHint: Restart the app to finish applying the upgrade.
minutesModeHint: Platform-wide: how meeting minutes are generated from a template. Applies from the next run.
llmTimeoutHint: Platform-wide request timeout for every AI call (summaries, minutes, actions, tags, embeddings). Raise it for slow local models. Default 120.
llmTimeoutInvalid: The LLM timeout must be a whole number of seconds (at least 5).
